title: Just Vanilla Server
body:
Server side modpack that contains only optimization mods, without changing vanilla mechanics or adding new

Note that it can be unstable due async mod. It also has few disabled optimizations in potatoptimized and tt20, because it breaks some farms.

I recommend install this modpack through [mrpack4server](https://github.com/Patbox/mrpack4server/releases), because now it is very simple to do
<details>
<summary>Current list of mods</summary>

- Achievement Optimizer
- Alternate Current
- Async
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Carpet mod
- Carpet TIS Addition
- Debugify
- Ducky Updater Rework
- EasyEula
- FerriteCore
- Krypton
- Let Me Despawn
- Lithium
- ModernFix
- Noisium
- Potatoptimize (few optimizations disabled)
- Raknetify
- ScalableLux
- ServerCore
- ThreadTweak
- TT20 (fluid acceleration disabled)

_(this list don't include libraries)_
</details>
